lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਦਾਤਾ ਏਕੁ ਤੂੰ ਤੂੰ ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: har prabh daataa ek toon toon aape bakhas milaae |
lines.english: O Lord God, You are the One and Only Giver; You forgive us, and unite us with Yourself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਨਿਰਮਲੇ ਚਲਹਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sabad rate se niramale chaleh satigur bhaae |7|
lines.english: Those who are attuned to the Shabad are immaculate and pure. They walk in harmony with the Will of the True Guru. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨੁ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਸਰਣਾਗਤੀ ਜਿਉ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਵੈ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੮॥੧॥੯॥
lines.translit: jan naanak saranaagatee jiau bhaavai tivai chhaddaae |8|1|9|
lines.english: Servant Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary; if it is Your Will, please save him! ||8||1||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਗਉੜੀ ਪੂਰਬੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਕਰਹਲੇ ॥
lines.translit: raag gaurree poorabee mahalaa 4 karahale |
lines.english: Raag Gauree Poorbee, Fourth Mehl, Karhalay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹਲੇ ਮਨ ਪਰਦੇਸੀਆ ਕਿਉ ਮਿਲੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: karahale man paradeseea kiau mileeai har maae |
lines.english: O my wandering mind, you are like a camel - how will you meet the Lord, your Mother?

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਭਾਗਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਗਲਿ ਮਿਲਿਆ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਆਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur bhaag poorai paaeaa gal miliaa piaaraa aae |1|
lines.english: When I found the Guru, by the destiny of perfect good fortune, my Beloved came and embraced me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਧਿਆਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa satigur purakh dhiaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O camel-like mind, meditate on the True Guru, the Primal Being. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਧਿਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa veechaareea har raam naam dhiaae |
lines.english: O camel-like mind, contemplate the Lord, and meditate on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਥੈ ਲੇਖਾ ਮੰਗੀਐ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੇ ਲਏ ਛਡਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jithai lekhaa mangeeai har aape le chhaddaae |2|
lines.english: When you are called to answer for your account, the Lord Himself shall release you. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਅਤਿ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਮਲੁ ਲਾਗੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਆਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa at niramalaa mal laagee haumai aae |
lines.english: O camel-like mind, you were once very pure; the filth of egotism has now attached itself to you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਭਾਲਿ ਭਾਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa mere preetamaa har ridai bhaal bhaalaae |
lines.english: O my beloved camel-like mind, search for the Lord within your own heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਤਖਿ ਪਿਰੁ ਘਰਿ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰਾ ਵਿਛੁੜਿ ਚੋਟਾ ਖਾਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: paratakh pir ghar naal piaaraa vichhurr chottaa khaae |3|
lines.english: Your Beloved Husband is now manifest before you in your own home, but you are separated from Him, and you suffer such pain! ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਾਇ ਕਿਤੈ ਨ ਲਭਈ ਗੁਰੁ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਦੇਖਾਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aupaae kitai na labhee gur hiradai har dekhaae |4|
lines.english: He cannot be found by any device; the Guru will show you the Lord within your heart. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰੈਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa mere preetamaa din rain har liv laae |
lines.english: O my beloved camel-like mind, day and night, lovingly attune yourself to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰੁ ਜਾਇ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਰੰਗ ਮਹਲੀ ਗੁਰੁ ਮੇਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਾਇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: ghar jaae paaveh rang mahalee gur mele har melaae |5|
lines.english: Return to your own home, and find the palace of love; meet the Guru, and meet the Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਖੰਡਿ ਲੋਭੀ ਮਾਰੀਐ ਜਮ ਡੰਡੁ ਦੇਇ ਸਜਾਇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: paakhandd lobhee maareeai jam ddandd dee sajaae |6|
lines.english: The hypocritical and the greedy are struck down; the Messenger of Death punishes them with his club. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਤੂੰ ਮੈਲੁ ਪਾਖੰਡੁ ਭਰਮੁ ਗਵਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa mere praan toon mail paakhandd bharam gavaae |
lines.english: O camel-like mind, you are my breath of life; rid yourself of the pollution of hypocrisy and doubt.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਤੂੰ ਮੀਤੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਪਾਖੰਡੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਤਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa toon meet meraa paakhandd lobh tajaae |
lines.english: O camel-like mind, you are my friend; abandon hypocrisy and greed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਸਰੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰਿਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤੀ ਮਲੁ ਲਹਿ ਜਾਇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har amrit sar gur pooriaa mil sangatee mal leh jaae |7|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru is the Ambrosial Pool of the Lord's Nectar; join the Holy Congregation, and wash away this pollution. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮੋਹੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਪਸਰਿਆ ਅੰਤਿ ਸਾਥਿ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਜਾਇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: eihu mohu maaeaa pasariaa ant saath na koee jaae |8|
lines.english: This emotional attachment to Maya is so pervasive. Ultimately, nothing shall go along with anyone. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ਇਕ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਿਖ ਸੁਣਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa mere piaariaa ik gur kee sikh sunaae |
lines.english: O my dear beloved camel-like mind, listen only to the Teachings of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਨਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਲਇਆ ਗਲਿ ਲਾਇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: har daragah painaaeaa har aap leaa gal laae |9|
lines.english: In the Court of the Lord, you shall be robed with honor, and the Lord Himself shall embrace you. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਜਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਖਰਚੁ ਲੀਆ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa mere saajanaa har kharach leea pat paae |
lines.english: O camel-like mind, my good friend, take the supplies of the Lord's Name, and obtain honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੰਨਿਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa gur maniaa guramukh kaar kamaae |
lines.english: O camel-like mind, one who surrenders to the Guru becomes Gurmukh, and works for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਉੜੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: gaurree mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Gauree, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਆਗੈ ਕਰਿ ਜੋਦੜੀ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਮੇਲਾਇ ॥੧੦॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur aagai kar jodarree jan naanak har melaae |10|1|
lines.english: Offer your prayers to the Guru; O servant Nanak, He shall unite you with the Lord. ||10||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਆ ਵੀਚਾਰਿ ਦੇਖੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa veechaareea veechaar dekh samaal |
lines.english: O contemplative camel-like mind, contemplate and look carefully.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਨ ਫਿਰਿ ਥਕੇ ਬਨ ਵਾਸੀਆ ਪਿਰੁ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: ban fir thake ban vaaseea pir guramat ridai nihaal |1|
lines.english: The forest-dwellers have grown weary of wandering in the forests; following the Guru's Teachings, see your Husband Lord within your heart. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਗੁਰ ਗੋਵਿੰਦੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa gur govind samaal |1| rahaau |
lines.english: O camel-like mind, dwell upon the Guru and the Lord of the Universe. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਵੀਚਾਰੀਆ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਫਾਥਿਆ ਮਹਾ ਜਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa veechaareea manamukh faathiaa mahaa jaal |
lines.english: O camel-like contemplative mind, the self-willed manmukhs are caught in the great net.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਹੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh praanee mukat hai har har naam samaal |2|
lines.english: The mortal who becomes Gurmukh is liberated, dwelling upon the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਮੇਰੇ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਭਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa mere piaariaa satasangat satigur bhaal |
lines.english: O my dear beloved camel-like mind, seek the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, and the True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਰਹਲਾ ਵਡਭਾਗੀਆ ਹਰਿ ਏਕ ਨਦਰਿ ਨਿਹਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man karahalaa vaddabhaageea har ek nadar nihaal |
lines.english: O very fortunate camel-like mind, with one Glance of Grace from the Lord, you shall be enraptured.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਲਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਚਲੈ ਤੇਰੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satasangat lag har dhiaaeeai har har chalai terai naal |3|
lines.english: Joining the Sat Sangat, meditate on the Lord, and the Lord, Har, Har, shall go along with you. ||3||
